originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&n` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= CONFIG_LOCKDEP true)
     (= CONFIG_SLOB true)
     (= CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER true)
     (= CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES false)
     (= CONFIG_SLAB false))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SLAB () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_SLOB () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_LOCKDEP () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER () Bool
  true)
reasoning: PC has CONFIG_SLOB=T. In 0f8f8094d28.c, kmalloc_caches is only declared under #ifndef CONFIG_SLOB (L25). When SLOB=T, kmalloc_caches is undeclared, making the reference at L36 a compile error. The analysis is on a non-compilable (infeasible) configuration, so this alarm is a false positive.
